'''''Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith Special Ashcan Edition''''' was a black and white preview issue of the ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith]]'' series published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] and [[Topps]]. It came polybagged with the collector's edition of [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 1|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine #1'']] in [[September]] [[1994]].

It featured the first twelve pages of [[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Dark Lords of the Sith #1'']], sketches of [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]], [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]], and cover art of the first two issues of the series by [[Chris Gossett]] and [[Mike Barreiro]], along with a brief history of ''[[Star Wars]]'' titles from Dark Horse Comics.
